output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent cutout must be planned as a separate PNG/SVG deliverable before compositing
required_views: side movement and labor posture view
back view showing repaired clothing, tools, bags, and family loads

regional and occupation lineup: Canyangao mountain villager, Jinhe grain-belt farmer, mill worker, boatman family member, ferry peddler, low clerk, old-capital remnant, child, elder, and household adult
daily-life pose sheet with measuring grain, carrying sacks, holding a food pouch, trading at a stall, protecting a child, queueing at a grain-token checkpoint, and returning to work
face, hands, sleeve patch, elbow patch, belt, knee patch, grain dust, swollen ankle, food pouch, empty cloth bag, broken grain measure, and work-tool close-ups
scale reference distinguishing ordinary civilians from refugee crowd and wall military households

composition_layers.foreground: ordinary human civilian lineup with regional, occupation, family, hunger, and working-life variation
composition_layers.midground: face, hands, repaired clothing, work tools, grain token, food pouch, empty cloth bag, grain dust, swollen ankle, and family load detail crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain character-card background with scale swatches and no readable captions or process metadata

composition_layer_notes: regional and occupation civilian lineup layer
daily work and family posture layer
fabric repair, hand, tool, food pouch, grain dust, and poverty-state detail crop layer
scale reference layer separating ordinary civilians from refugees, wall military households, and market underclass groups
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
crowd contains visible age, gender, occupation, region, family, and poverty-level variation instead of one repeated poor background figure
ordinary civilians are clearly distinct from refugee crowd, wall military households, and wall-foot market underclass groups
poverty is expressed through work-worn fabric, food pressure, grain tokens, tools, and fatigue while daily life and labor structure remain visible
card is not treated as a final video frame
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
character cards must keep face, hair, hands, costume silhouette, and key carried items readable without relying on a gray dust filter
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background
related_required_deliverables: transparent cutout for selected civilian groups planned separately if needed

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

generation_notes: Regenerated after art direction: ordinary civilians now have intact work clothing, wheat/indigo/green/hemp regional and occupation colors, aprons, hats, baskets, ferry and grain tools, and production-life order distinct from refugees and wall households.

visible_lock_injection.visible_prompt_policy: Model-visible text contains visual constraints only. Raw asset IDs, output paths, source refs, and usage notes remain in production_metadata; semantic asset names may be visible.

generation_notes: Regenerated after art direction: wall-foot market crowd now emphasizes transaction layers, hidden pockets, black passes, grain tokens, grey awnings, debt cords, subtle hybrid traces, and market survival gear distinct from ordinary civilians.

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建墙下集市无籍者与粮牌黑市群像模板，作为全剧共享的墙下集市交易人群、无籍者、混裔跑腿、军户家眷和黑市商参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、灰布棚阴影、窑洞门冷风、炭火烟、旧布、黑木通行牌、粮牌和夹缝交易压力优先。墙下集市人群必须有职业、交易和身份层级，不是普通村落集市、逃荒营地或整齐军户队列。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 墙下集市无籍者与粮牌黑市群像模板，表现边墙南麓灰布棚、窑洞门和粮牌交换点周围的人群：无籍者、混裔跑腿、军户家眷、黑市商、灰墙军粮牌贩、债务追讨者、传话孩子、摊主和谨慎旧遗民并列。这里有交易秩序、隐藏口袋、黑木通行牌、碎陶护符、旧旗残片、粮牌和进墙名额压力，不是流民营，也不是普通村落集市。身份与体态：混合年龄群像：跑腿少年、成年交易者、军户家眷、老人和传话孩子并列，年龄结构服务交易与生存压力；脸型五官不统一，包含混裔痕迹、警惕眼神、讨价表情、债务压力和长期夹缝生活疲态；不能复制陆青砾个人脸；头发多被帽、头巾或旧围巾压住，皮肤有风沙、炭火烟、冷汗、局部鳞痕或混裔痕迹，不能怪物化或干净商铺化；普通中陆人族与混裔尺度混杂，跑腿者灵活偏瘦，黑市商更厚重，军户家眷带负重和防备姿态。关键锚点：无籍者、混裔跑腿、军户家眷、黑市商、灰墙军粮牌贩、粮牌交换点、灰布棚、窑洞门、碎陶护符、旧旗残片、隐藏口袋、黑木通行牌、粮牌、进墙名额、窄巷交易秩序、耳后细鳞痕或混裔痕迹、债务压力、不是流民营、不是普通平民村落、不是正规军户队列
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral character crowd master card。包含墙下集市人群正面、侧面、背面和三分之四群像视图；至少出现无籍者、混裔跑腿、军户家眷、黑市商、粮牌贩、债务追讨者和传话孩子中的多类；加入换粮牌、藏碎陶、低声卖暗号、堵住欠债者、护黑木通行牌、观察清明院压力、在灰布棚下讨价的姿态；需要脸、手、耳后混裔痕迹、隐藏口袋、碎陶护符、黑木通行牌、粮牌、旧旗残片和灰布棚材质局部裁切。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：必须保持墙下集市的夹缝秩序：人群旧但有职业、交易和身份层级；混裔、无籍者、军户家眷、黑市商和粮牌贩一眼可分。不能把它画成普通平民集市、逃荒流民营、正规边墙军户队列或陆青砾个人复制群。体态尺度必须保持：传话孩子约115-145厘米，跑腿少年约145-170厘米，成年交易者约155-185厘米，个别混裔可更高但不超过奴兵层级压迫感；从瘦小跑腿者、缺粮无籍者、负重军户家眷到厚实黑市商都有差异；跑腿者肩窄步快，黑市商重心低，军户家眷抱物护身，混裔局部体态不对称但仍保留人族直立轮廓；灰布棚阴影、隐藏口袋、黑木通行牌、碎陶护符、粮牌、旧旗残片、低声交易手势和窄巷侧身姿态形成墙下集市剪影。尺度参照：同画面至少出现无籍者、混裔跑腿、军户家眷和黑市商中的三类；陆青砾个人身份卡只作区分，不能复制他的脸和主角式挂点；比普通人族平民群像更夹缝、更交易化、更警惕；不像正式边墙军户群像，不形成守墙队列或统一装备。若出现粮牌、通行牌、旧旗残片、标记或文字类痕迹，只做抽象可控形状，不生成可读文字、随机徽记或现代标识。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代市场、现代招牌、现代塑料袋、现代货币、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、普通村落赶集、逃荒流民营、整齐军户队列、同款黑市斗篷人、怪物化混裔、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。不要复制陆青砾个人脸、主角式挂点和独有身份锚点。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

硬锁：必须保持墙下集市的夹缝秩序：人群旧但有职业、交易和身份层级；混裔、无籍者、军户家眷、黑市商和粮牌贩一眼可分。不能把它画成普通平民集市、逃荒流民营、正规边墙军户队列或陆青砾个人复制群。体态尺度必须保持：传话孩子约115-145厘米，跑腿少年约145-170厘米，成年交易者约155-185厘米，个别混裔可更高但不超过奴兵层级压迫感；从瘦小跑腿者、缺粮无籍者、负重军户家眷到厚实黑市商都有差异；跑腿者肩窄步快，黑市商重心低，军户家眷抱物护身，混裔局部体态不对称但仍保留人族直立轮廓；灰布棚阴影、隐藏口袋、黑木通行牌、碎陶护符、粮牌、旧旗残片、低声交易手势和窄巷侧身姿态形成墙下集市剪影。尺度参照：同画面至少出现无籍者、混裔跑腿、军户家眷和黑市商中的三类；陆青砾个人身份卡只作区分，不能复制他的脸和主角式挂点；比普通人族平民群像更夹缝、更交易化、更警惕；不像正式边墙军户群像，不形成守墙队列或统一装备。若出现粮牌、通行牌、旧旗残片、标记或文字类痕迹，只做抽象可控形状，不生成可读文字、随机徽记或现代标识。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代市场、现代招牌、现代塑料袋、现代货币、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、普通村落赶集、逃荒流民营、整齐军户队列、同款黑市斗篷人、怪物化混裔、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。不要复制陆青砾个人脸、主角式挂点和独有身份锚点。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。
copy_ready.gemini_image_prompt:
Create a cinematic production asset reference card using this Chinese six-section prompt. Use all supplied approved reference images/control layers when provided, and do not invent precise symbols or readable text.

创建墙下集市无籍者与粮牌黑市群像模板，作为全剧共享的墙下集市交易人群、无籍者、混裔跑腿、军户家眷和黑市商参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、灰布棚阴影、窑洞门冷风、炭火烟、旧布、黑木通行牌、粮牌和夹缝交易压力优先。墙下集市人群必须有职业、交易和身份层级，不是普通村落集市、逃荒营地或整齐军户队列。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent cutout must be planned as a separate PNG/SVG deliverable before compositing
required_views: side trading and movement view in narrow market flow
back view showing hidden pockets, grey cloth awnings, market packs, wooden passes, and mixed-status clothing layers
market-role lineup: nameless person, hybrid runner, military-household family member, black market trader, grain-token broker, debt collector, messenger child, stall keeper, and cautious old remnant
transaction pose sheet with grain-token exchange, hidden shard transfer, blocking a debtor, whispering a route, bargaining under a grey cloth awning, and watching Qingming pressure
face, ear/scale trace, hands, hidden pocket, black wooden pass, broken pottery charm, grain token, grey cloth awning, old flag scrap, and stall-object close-ups
scale reference distinguishing wall-foot market people from ordinary civilians, refugees, and formal wall military households

composition_layers.foreground: wall-foot market human and hybrid underclass lineup with nameless people, runners, household relatives, traders, brokers, debt collectors, children, and elders
composition_layers.midground: face, hands, ear or scale trace, hidden pocket, black wooden pass, broken pottery charm, grain token, old flag scrap, stall goods, and transaction gesture detail crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain character-card background with market-flow scale swatches and no readable captions or process metadata

composition_layer_notes: transaction and narrow-lane movement posture layer
hidden pocket, token, charm, pass, hand, face, and mixed-status clothing detail crop layer
scale reference layer separating market underclass from ordinary civilians, refugees, and formal wall military households
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
crowd contains visible status, species-mixing, job, age, gender, debt, trading, and military-household-relative variation instead of one generic black market crowd
wall-foot market people are clearly distinct from ordinary civilians, refugees, and formal wall military households
market order, transaction logic, hidden pockets, grain-token pressure, and nameless/hybrid identity cues remain visible without readable text
card is not treated as a final video frame
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
character cards must keep face, hair, hands, costume silhouette, and key carried items readable without relying on a gray dust filter
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background
related_required_deliverables: transparent cutout for selected market groups planned separately if needed

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

generation_notes: Regenerated after art direction: wall-foot market crowd now emphasizes transaction layers, hidden pockets, black passes, grain tokens, grey awnings, debt cords, subtle hybrid traces, and market survival gear distinct from ordinary civilians.

usage: 第一季起点
火前/火后复用母版
production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_file; retained intermediates go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filter becomes the dominant overall palette
reject if warm regional/faction/class colors are only tiny accents rather than the main readable color structure

reject if fewer than three readable hue families are present on costume, armor, civilian clothing, character, style-board, or usable scene cards unless a specific institutional uniform contract explicitly requires fewer
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series look or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: condition/material/supporting color only
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: warm and chromatic regional/faction/class anchors must be the main read

reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建残阳坳村落与药屋主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 中央大陆中南部旧驿村落，药屋、旧井、村口检查桌、低坡后山和药柜暗格空间关系清楚，土褐、麦金、草药青、旧木褐和炊烟灰构成可居住但被清查的故土。行动区域：旧井；药屋；药柜暗格；村口检查桌；后山坡；草药篮；猎弓架。关键锚点：旧井、药屋、药柜暗格、村口检查桌、后山坡、草药篮、猎弓架
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：必须先显示生活秩序与工具，再显示清明籍清查压力；火后仍能辨认旧井、药屋焦梁和暗格位置。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建旧驿暗道白石残段主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 残阳坳地下旧驿残段，旧白石低拱、潮湿石壁、岔路刻痕、剥落日月双印和断续金赤路线光形成被遗忘术压住但仍残留功能的交通系统。行动区域：白石低拱；剥落日月双印；岔路刻痕；半断金赤路线光；沈季衡测绘符号。关键锚点：白石低拱、剥落日月双印、岔路刻痕、半断金赤路线光、沈季衡测绘符号
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：反应短促、局部、有限，不能变成万能传送、奇观密宫或战斗解决方案。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

Create a cinematic production asset reference card using this Chinese six-section prompt. Use all supplied approved reference images/control layers when provided, and do not invent precise symbols or readable text.

创建旧驿暗道白石残段主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。

残阳坳地下旧驿残段，旧白石低拱、潮湿石壁、岔路刻痕、剥落日月双印和断续金赤路线光形成被遗忘术压住但仍残留功能的交通系统。行动区域：白石低拱；剥落日月双印；岔路刻痕；半断金赤路线光；沈季衡测绘符号。关键锚点：白石低拱、剥落日月双印、岔路刻痕、半断金赤路线光、沈季衡测绘符号

16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。

硬锁：反应短促、局部、有限，不能变成万能传送、奇观密宫或战斗解决方案。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

请根据以下六段结构生成一张电影级资产参考图。

创建金河粮磨区与渡船主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。

金河中游粮仓带，水轮、泵房、蒸汽磨盘、粮袋轨车、粮牌检查口、湿木码头和渡河蒸汽船在河雾中相连，深河青、湿木褐、铁灰、蒸汽白、油黑和暗粮牌黄构成生产压迫。行动区域：粮牌检查口；蒸汽磨盘；磨平炮架接口；湿木码头；渡河蒸汽船；河雾。关键锚点：粮牌检查口、蒸汽磨盘、磨平炮架接口、湿木码头、渡河蒸汽船、河雾

16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。

硬锁：蒸汽技术是被保留的生产工具而非欢乐蒸汽朋克；磨平军用接口和封蜡粮牌必须可见。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

usage: 灭史空间母版
旧书会线索参考

basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer

reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge

reject if gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filter becomes the dominant overall palette

visible_lock_injection.visible_prompt_policy: Model-visible text contains visual constraints only. Raw asset IDs, output paths, source refs, and usage notes remain in production_metadata; semantic asset names may be visible.

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：不是恐怖地牢或普通废墟空景；文明断代必须由书架、星图、封条和残页表达。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

copy_ready.positive_prompt:
创建灰烬书院文明断代主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。

旧书库遗址，焦黑拱廊、炭化书架、碎裂星图盘、纸灰、裂铜、残月白和虫蜡封条组成文明断代空间，儿童识别角落与旧书会藏身处控制在少量人物尺度。行动区域：焦黑书架；碎裂星图盘；残月白；虫蜡封条；焚帆令残页；儿童识别角落。关键锚点：焦黑书架、碎裂星图盘、残月白、虫蜡封条、焚帆令残页、儿童识别角落

copy_ready.reference_image_instructions: 参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

usage: 清明籍制度空间母版
production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_file; retained intermediates go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filter becomes the dominant overall palette
reject if warm regional/faction/class colors are only tiny accents rather than the main readable color structure

reject if fewer than three readable hue families are present on costume, armor, civilian clothing, character, style-board, or usable scene cards unless a specific institutional uniform contract explicitly requires fewer

typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建清明院外署白墙主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 清明院地方外署，虫蜡白、骨白、珍珠灰、黑日与冷金形成过度洁净的制度空间，白墙登记厅、白册台、虫蜡针室、蜂巢记忆室入口和后巷路线清楚。行动区域：白墙登记厅；白册台；虫蜡针室；蜂巢记忆室门口；后巷；清明香烟。关键锚点：白墙登记厅、白册台、虫蜡针室、蜂巢记忆室门口、后巷、清明香烟
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：压迫来自洁净、秩序和执行层级，必须区分白册官吏、奴兵、虫族士兵与白翳。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

usage: 无籍者与混裔世界母版

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建墙下集市无籍者空间主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。

硬锁：旧但有职业和交易秩序，不是流民营；空间复杂感来自摊位、手部交易、门洞和窄巷。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。
copy_ready.gemini_image_prompt:
Create a cinematic production asset reference card using this Chinese six-section prompt. Use all supplied approved reference images/control layers when provided, and do not invent precise symbols or readable text.

创建墙下集市无籍者空间主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

usage: 边墙战争与控粮冲突母版

visible_lock_injection.visible_prompt_policy: Model-visible text contains visual constraints only. Raw asset IDs, output paths, source refs, and usage notes remain in production_metadata; semantic asset names may be visible.

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

创建锁喉关边墙主门场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。

绝境山脉最窄山口边墙主门，黑石城门、骨钟、粮仓门、墙顶雪道、拒马、雪泥和裸露旧日月阵基构成通路狭窄、人群渺小、粮仓控制和战争消耗的边界空间。行动区域：黑石城门；骨钟；粮仓门；旧日月阵基；墙顶雪道；拒马；雪泥。关键锚点：黑石城门、骨钟、粮仓门、旧日月阵基、墙顶雪道、拒马、雪泥

16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。

硬锁：边墙不是壮丽背景，而是军户牢笼、战场和可能重签盟约的边界；攻城必须拆成兵种、共生兽和城防反应。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。
copy_ready.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

copy_ready.reference_image_instructions: 参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

usage: 北境寻灾源视觉入口
production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_file; retained intermediates go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filter becomes the dominant overall palette
reject if warm regional/faction/class colors are only tiny accents rather than the main readable color structure

reject if fewer than three readable hue families are present on costume, armor, civilian clothing, character, style-board, or usable scene cards unless a specific institutional uniform contract explicitly requires fewer
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series look or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: condition/material/supporting color only
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: warm and chromatic regional/faction/class anchors must be the main read

character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建鸣骨岭北境过渡场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 边墙外风蚀骨雪岭，半埋骨骸、骨孔、雪坑、枯草冻土、冰蓝火、冻裂旧兵器和迁徙痕迹在暴雪中形成从人族战线到北境灾民世界的过渡。行动区域：风蚀骨孔；雪坑；冰蓝火；鹿弥骨饰；骨笛；盟书印记；冻裂旧兵器。关键锚点：风蚀骨孔、雪坑、冰蓝火、鹿弥骨饰、骨笛、盟书印记、冻裂旧兵器
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：氛围不能压过剧情，重点是救援、躲追兵、辨认印记和骨笛求救；北境角色要有迁徙和救援痕迹。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette

location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails

reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建寒鸦堡军府档案主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 边墙最高军事堡垒，旧人族黑石堡墙被肃明甲军府覆盖，虫膜走廊、审讯厅、虫蜡档案墙、堡门和旧档暗格叠在一起，表现人族堡垒被占领而非纯虫巢。行动区域：黑石堡墙；虫膜走廊；审讯厅；虫蜡档案墙；白翅黑日检查点；旧档暗格。关键锚点：黑石堡墙、虫膜走廊、审讯厅、虫蜡档案墙、白翅黑日检查点、旧档暗格
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：潜入路线限制在膜廊、审讯厅、档案墙和堡门，材质比清明院更军事、更寒冷。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

Create a cinematic production asset reference card using this Chinese six-section prompt. Use all supplied approved reference images/control layers when provided, and do not invent precise symbols or readable text.

创建寒鸦堡军府档案主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。

边墙最高军事堡垒，旧人族黑石堡墙被肃明甲军府覆盖，虫膜走廊、审讯厅、虫蜡档案墙、堡门和旧档暗格叠在一起，表现人族堡垒被占领而非纯虫巢。行动区域：黑石堡墙；虫膜走廊；审讯厅；虫蜡档案墙；白翅黑日检查点；旧档暗格。关键锚点：黑石堡墙、虫膜走廊、审讯厅、虫蜡档案墙、白翅黑日检查点、旧档暗格

16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。

硬锁：潜入路线限制在膜廊、审讯厅、档案墙和堡门，材质比清明院更军事、更寒冷。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.background_policy_notes: scene_card_with_spatial_environment; must be a photorealistic usable scene card, not an abstract diagram
output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: readable entry points, usable set pieces, props, ground texture, and human-scale anchors
composition_layers.midground: main route geometry, action lanes, architectural rhythm, crowd or occupation pressure when applicable
composition_layers.background: full spatial environment, skyline or terrain boundary, weather, light direction, and institutional or regional material system

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
foreground, midground, and background remain readable
entrances, exits, action zones, and geography are clear
not a transparent cutout or final shot override
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
location cards must be rendered as photorealistic usable scene assets, not abstract blockout diagrams, flat swatch boards, or schematic composition thumbnails
location cards must identify the intended human placement zone and keep that zone readable against character and costume reference palettes
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray

warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

请根据以下六段结构生成一张电影级资产参考图。

创建月下盟书旧驿主场景卡，作为全剧共享场景空间与镜头参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 场景必须有可行动空间、入口退路、前中后景层次、天气/光线压力和材质逻辑，不做纯背景墙。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：色调服从当前场景情绪；该阴暗时阴暗，该明亮时明亮，该宏伟时宏伟，禁止默认压抑灰暗。场景必须先画出景色、土地、故土、建筑尺度和地域材质的美感，再让制度、战争、流亡、贫困或灾后痕迹作为人祸伤口压在其上形成反差。灰、冷灰、灰褐、黑灰、烟尘、雪雾、灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧统一滤镜；人物放置区、入口、退路和行动通道必须通过色相、明度、材质、边缘光或构图留白与背景分离。

边墙背后旧驿群核心，地下星图厅、月白石台、多族印记墙、残缺盟书、日月双印裂纹和断续金赤路线共同说明这里不是皇座，而是多族共同守边的残缺承诺现场。行动区域：地下星图厅；月白石台；多族印记墙；残缺盟书；日月双印裂纹；金赤路线。关键锚点：地下星图厅、月白石台、多族印记墙、残缺盟书、日月双印裂纹、金赤路线

16:9 location master scene card。包含宽景建立、人物中景行动区、道具/材质近景、入口退路、可藏身边缘、前景/中景/背景分层和天气光线压力；保持空间可走、可拍、可复用。

硬锁：盟书必须有多族印记和旧债感，不能视觉上只像皇族圣物或纯洁圣殿。明确主要入口、退路、可藏身边缘和镜头可读通道，不把场景画成纯背景墙。提供宽景建立、人物中景行动、道具/材质近景三类可复用视角。必须先服务剧情行动和社会功能，再表现奇观；不能画成纯背景墙、旅游概念图或无入口退路的装饰场景。若出现标记、榜文、印章或势力符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 场景必须有暖色或多色主导的生活、制度或地域色块，人物放置区不能落在同色灰墙、灰地、灰雾中；入口、行动通道和前中后景需要色相或明度分离。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代城市设施、旅游景点感、纯概念背景、无行动通道、无前中后景、满屏奇观、随机可读招牌、现代标识。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。
