copy_ready.chatgpt_image_prompt:
请根据以下六段结构生成一张电影级资产参考图。

创建灰墙军旧甲片与骨哨道具卡，作为全剧共享道具/物件视觉资产参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 道具必须有明确尺寸、重量、材质厚度、磨损路径和手持/场景尺度；精确符号优先交给线控或后合成。

灰墙军旧甲片、骨哨、裂盾、缝补甲绳和军户木牌道具板，旧铁、黑石灰、干血暗红和雪线磨损叠在一起，甲片内侧可见严重磨损日月压痕。材料与表面：旧甲片；日月压痕；骨哨；裂盾；缝补甲绳；军户木牌。尺度与使用方式：可缝在旧袄胸前或由老墙师挂在腰侧。关键锚点：旧甲片、日月压痕、骨哨、裂盾、缝补甲绳、军户木牌

16:9 neutral prop master card。包含正视、侧视、背面或展开视图、手持/人物尺度参考、材质近景、磨损痕迹、结构分层和关键状态变体；画面使用中性背景，不当作最终视频帧。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、符号、尺度和材质连续性；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要崭新展示品感、万能神器化、现代工业产品感、过度发光、可读乱码、随机新徽章、随机文字、和剧情无关的装饰堆砌。

copy_ready.reference_image_instructions: 参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、符号、尺度和材质连续性；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent cutout or SVG/PNG line-control layer must be planned separately for compositing or exact symbols
required_views: top or open-state view when useful

composition_layers.foreground: front, back, side, scale, and silhouette views of the prop or item with readable handling points
composition_layers.midground: material thickness, mechanism, damage, marking, seal, emblem, or text-like detail crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain prop-card background with scale reference layer; transparent or line-control derivatives are separate deliverables

composition_layer_notes: hand or tabletop scale reference layer
precision symbol or line-control note layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
physical dimensions and scale references are visible
exact emblems, seals, maps, records, flags, or text-like marks are not invented freely by the image model
card is not used as a transparent cutout substitute
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
related_required_deliverables: transparent cutout when compositing is needed
line-control or SVG/PNG post-composite layer for exact symbols

usage: 昭明旧帝国根徽章旗帜
旧驿遗迹石刻
驿令/血牒/盟书/旗布统一符号
昭明相关服饰纹样和后合成母版
production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_file; retained intermediates go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent emblem, flag-mask, or SVG/PNG line-control layers must be planned separately for exact compositing
required_views: cloth flag or banner application view
seal, patch, armor, or stone application view
scale reference across costume, ruin, and prop use

composition_layers.foreground: locked root emblem geometry, flat emblem view, flag or banner application view, and precision line-control planning layer
composition_layers.midground: costume patch, seal, stone, wax, armor, cloth weathering, material wear, and derivative application crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain prop-card background with scale reference layer; transparent or line-control derivatives are separate deliverables

composition_layer_notes: flag fabric and banner application layer
costume, seal, stone, wax, or armor application layer
precision line-control and transparent derivative note layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
approved root emblem geometry is preserved and not redesigned
flag, costume, ruin, seal, and prop applications derive from the same root emblem
exact emblem and flag geometry is not invented freely by the image model
transparent cutouts, masks, and SVG/PNG line-control layers are treated as separate required deliverables
related_required_deliverables: flag fabric mask and weathering guide
costume patch, seal, stone-carving, and prop application crops

visible_lock_injection.visible_prompt_policy: Model-visible text contains visual constraints only. Raw asset IDs, output paths, source refs, and usage notes remain in production_metadata; semantic asset names may be visible.

prompt_revision.reason: Compressed series asset prompt into readable six-section model-visible template; upstream dependency detail remains in reference_inputs and copy_ready reference instructions.

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建昭明日月星盘徽章与朱赤旗帜基础母版，作为全剧共享道具/物件视觉资产参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 道具必须有明确尺寸、重量、材质厚度、磨损路径和手持/场景尺度；精确符号优先交给线控或后合成。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 昭明帝国航海星盘式日月徽章与朱赤旗帜基础母版，锁定金色日芒、精密星盘/罗盘、月白弧环、深朱赤漆布、磨损金和旧白石裂纹，必须呈现高级旧文明、航权、星图和旧债感。材料与表面：深朱赤旗布、磨损金、月白陶玉/象牙嵌、旧白石、干血红细线、裂纹漆面。尺度与使用方式：从胸口刺绣、玉片印记、驿令小牌到城门石刻和朱赤大旗均使用同一根徽章几何。关键锚点：航海星盘日月徽章、金色日芒、月白环、深朱赤旗布、磨损金、旧白石裂纹、日月照耀皆为故土
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral prop master card。包含正视、侧视、背面或展开视图、手持/人物尺度参考、材质近景、磨损痕迹、结构分层和关键状态变体；画面使用中性背景，不当作最终视频帧。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：不得重画成普通太阳图标、现代国旗、胜利英雄旗或纯洁圣徽；所有延展只能在同一日月星盘根徽章上做磨损、遮挡、材质和尺度变化。物理尺度必须保持：徽章母版在参考卡中主图约18到28厘米等效；旗帜应用可扩展到城门或战场尺度；徽章母版约18到28厘米等效；旗布版按16:9卡内比例展示长旗和残旗两种宽度；平面徽章/旗面无厚度；石刻、蜡封、金属压纹另以2到8毫米浅浮雕展示；图形母版无实体重量；实体版本分别为漆布、金属压片、陶玉嵌件或石刻；旗布纤维、磨损金线、月白嵌件、石刻浅槽和蜡封压痕分层可读。必须展示从崭新母版到剧内磨损应用的连续关系：布面污雪、石刻裂纹、蜡封压痕、甲片磨损、袖口刺绣或旗边破损均不能改动根徽章几何。这是根符号母版，可展示清晰的几何设计、材质应用和尺度变体；后续精确复用必须从本母版派生线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成层。本卡就是后续派生的根参考。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 道具必须有明确尺寸、重量、材质厚度、磨损路径和手持/场景尺度；精确符号优先交给线控或后合成。

昭明帝国航海星盘式日月徽章与朱赤旗帜基础母版，锁定金色日芒、精密星盘/罗盘、月白弧环、深朱赤漆布、磨损金和旧白石裂纹，必须呈现高级旧文明、航权、星图和旧债感。材料与表面：深朱赤旗布、磨损金、月白陶玉/象牙嵌、旧白石、干血红细线、裂纹漆面。尺度与使用方式：从胸口刺绣、玉片印记、驿令小牌到城门石刻和朱赤大旗均使用同一根徽章几何。关键锚点：航海星盘日月徽章、金色日芒、月白环、深朱赤旗布、磨损金、旧白石裂纹、日月照耀皆为故土

16:9 neutral prop master card。包含正视、侧视、背面或展开视图、手持/人物尺度参考、材质近景、磨损痕迹、结构分层和关键状态变体；画面使用中性背景，不当作最终视频帧。

硬锁：不得重画成普通太阳图标、现代国旗、胜利英雄旗或纯洁圣徽；所有延展只能在同一日月星盘根徽章上做磨损、遮挡、材质和尺度变化。物理尺度必须保持：徽章母版在参考卡中主图约18到28厘米等效；旗帜应用可扩展到城门或战场尺度；徽章母版约18到28厘米等效；旗布版按16:9卡内比例展示长旗和残旗两种宽度；平面徽章/旗面无厚度；石刻、蜡封、金属压纹另以2到8毫米浅浮雕展示；图形母版无实体重量；实体版本分别为漆布、金属压片、陶玉嵌件或石刻；旗布纤维、磨损金线、月白嵌件、石刻浅槽和蜡封压痕分层可读。必须展示从崭新母版到剧内磨损应用的连续关系：布面污雪、石刻裂纹、蜡封压痕、甲片磨损、袖口刺绣或旗边破损均不能改动根徽章几何。这是根符号母版，可展示清晰的几何设计、材质应用和尺度变体；后续精确复用必须从本母版派生线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成层。本卡就是后续派生的根参考。

参考图执行规则：本资产是根参考母版；生成时只建立当前资产的材质、尺度、磨损、轮廓和可控留白。若后续需要精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或文字痕迹，最终几何必须通过线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成锁定。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要崭新展示品感、万能神器化、现代工业产品感、过度发光、可读乱码、随机新徽章、随机文字、和剧情无关的装饰堆砌。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent emblem, flag-mask, or SVG/PNG line-control layers must be planned separately for exact compositing
required_views: cloth flag or banner application view
seal, patch, armor, or stone application view
scale reference across costume, ruin, and prop use

composition_layers.foreground: locked root emblem geometry, flat emblem view, flag or banner application view, and precision line-control planning layer
composition_layers.midground: costume patch, seal, stone, wax, armor, cloth weathering, material wear, and derivative application crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain prop-card background with scale reference layer; transparent or line-control derivatives are separate deliverables

composition_layer_notes: flag fabric and banner application layer
costume, seal, stone, wax, or armor application layer
precision line-control and transparent derivative note layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
approved root emblem geometry is preserved and not redesigned
flag, costume, ruin, seal, and prop applications derive from the same root emblem
exact emblem and flag geometry is not invented freely by the image model
transparent cutouts, masks, and SVG/PNG line-control layers are treated as separate required deliverables
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
related_required_deliverables: flag fabric mask and weathering guide
costume patch, seal, stone-carving, and prop application crops

肃明国/清明院黑日白翅徽章与旗帜基础母版，锁定黑日底盘、角形白翼刃、珍珠灰裂环、虫蜡白、骨白、冷金钉和无尘制度感，白翅必须像翼刃/虫膜覆盖层，不是天使羽翼。材料与表面：黑日釉盘、骨白/虫蜡白翼刃、珍珠灰裂环、冷金钉、黑绿甲壳、旧铁束具、无尘白墙。尺度与使用方式：从白册小章、官帽/胸牌、军阶牌、墙面封条到清明院旗帜均使用同一根徽章几何。关键锚点：黑日底盘、角形白翼刃、珍珠灰裂环、虫蜡白、骨白、冷金钉、清明白册、无尘制度感

16:9 neutral prop master card。包含正视、侧视、背面或展开视图、手持/人物尺度参考、材质近景、磨损痕迹、结构分层和关键状态变体；画面使用中性背景，不当作最终视频帧。

硬锁：不得重画成大虫身体、柔软天使翅膀、怪物巢穴、现代医院标志或普通黑白旗；所有层级标识、白册章、封条和旗面必须从同一黑日白翅根徽章派生。物理尺度必须保持：徽章母版在参考卡中主图约16到26厘米等效；旗帜应用可扩展到署门和军府尺度；徽章母版约16到26厘米等效；旗布版展示窄旗、封条和墙章三种比例；平面徽章/旗面无厚度；白册章、蜡封和军阶牌以1到6毫米压纹层展示；图形母版无实体重量；实体版本分别为虫蜡封条、骨白漆牌、冷金钉牌或甲壳压牌；黑日釉面、白翼刃覆层、裂环、冷金钉和虫蜡封边分层可读。必须展示从崭新母版到剧内磨损应用的连续关系：布面污雪、石刻裂纹、蜡封压痕、甲片磨损、袖口刺绣或旗边破损均不能改动根徽章几何。这是根符号母版，可展示清晰的几何设计、材质应用和尺度变体；后续精确复用必须从本母版派生线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成层。本卡就是后续派生的根参考。

参考图执行规则：本资产是根参考母版；生成时只建立当前资产的材质、尺度、磨损、轮廓和可控留白。若后续需要精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或文字痕迹，最终几何必须通过线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成锁定。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要崭新展示品感、万能神器化、现代工业产品感、过度发光、可读乱码、随机新徽章、随机文字、和剧情无关的装饰堆砌。

seal, patch, armor, or stone application view
scale reference across costume, ruin, and prop use

composition_layers.foreground: locked root emblem geometry, flat emblem view, flag or banner application view, and precision line-control planning layer
composition_layers.midground: costume patch, seal, stone, wax, armor, cloth weathering, material wear, and derivative application crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain prop-card background with scale reference layer; transparent or line-control derivatives are separate deliverables

composition_layer_notes: flag fabric and banner application layer
costume, seal, stone, wax, or armor application layer
precision line-control and transparent derivative note layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
approved root emblem geometry is preserved and not redesigned
flag, costume, ruin, seal, and prop applications derive from the same root emblem
exact emblem and flag geometry is not invented freely by the image model
transparent cutouts, masks, and SVG/PNG line-control layers are treated as separate required deliverables
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
related_required_deliverables: flag fabric mask and weathering guide
costume patch, seal, stone-carving, and prop application crops

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建北境万兽部落联盟徽章与旗帜基础母版，作为全剧共享道具/物件视觉资产参考卡。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 道具必须有明确尺寸、重量、材质厚度、磨损路径和手持/场景尺度；精确符号优先交给线控或后合成。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 北境万兽部落联盟骨木徽章与旗帜基础母版，锁定骨、角、旧木、兽皮绳、爪齿刻、赭土、灰烬和冰蓝生存火点组成的多族誓结，不是单一动物吉祥物。材料与表面：雕骨、鹿角/羊角、旧木、树皮、兽皮绳、筋绳、爪齿、赭土颜料、灰烬黑痕、冰蓝生存火点。尺度与使用方式：从骨饰、护符、盾面、鼓面、皮帐门帘到兽皮旗帜和攻城器具标记均使用同一根徽章几何。关键锚点：骨木万兽誓结、鹿角枝纹、狼耳缺口、熊爪刻痕、羊角弧、乌鸦羽影木片、兽皮绳结、赭土与灰烬、冰蓝生存火点
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral prop master card。包含正视、侧视、背面或展开视图、手持/人物尺度参考、材质近景、磨损痕迹、结构分层和关键状态变体；画面使用中性背景，不当作最终视频帧。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：不得重画成单一狼头/狮头/可爱动物/怪物潮/金属高科技旗帜；所有北境服饰、盾鼓、皮帐、骨饰、誓约绳和旗面必须从同一骨木万兽誓结派生。物理尺度必须保持：徽章母版在参考卡中主图约20到32厘米等效；旗帜和盾鼓应用可扩展到帐门或战场尺度；徽章母版约20到32厘米等效；旗布版展示皮旗、盾牌、鼓面和绳结四种比例；骨木实体有2到12厘米厚度变化；皮旗和刻痕应用为平面/浅浮雕；骨木主徽厚重粗粝，皮旗轻但被绳结和骨片压住，适合低技术迁徙部族携带；骨片、角枝、旧木、兽皮绳、爪齿、皮旗和赭土颜料分层可读。必须展示从崭新母版到剧内磨损应用的连续关系：布面污雪、石刻裂纹、蜡封压痕、甲片磨损、袖口刺绣或旗边破损均不能改动根徽章几何。这是根符号母版，可展示清晰的几何设计、材质应用和尺度变体；后续精确复用必须从本母版派生线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成层。本卡就是后续派生的根参考。

创建北境万兽部落联盟徽章与旗帜基础母版，作为全剧共享道具/物件视觉资产参考卡。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 道具必须有明确尺寸、重量、材质厚度、磨损路径和手持/场景尺度；精确符号优先交给线控或后合成。

北境万兽部落联盟骨木徽章与旗帜基础母版，锁定骨、角、旧木、兽皮绳、爪齿刻、赭土、灰烬和冰蓝生存火点组成的多族誓结，不是单一动物吉祥物。材料与表面：雕骨、鹿角/羊角、旧木、树皮、兽皮绳、筋绳、爪齿、赭土颜料、灰烬黑痕、冰蓝生存火点。尺度与使用方式：从骨饰、护符、盾面、鼓面、皮帐门帘到兽皮旗帜和攻城器具标记均使用同一根徽章几何。关键锚点：骨木万兽誓结、鹿角枝纹、狼耳缺口、熊爪刻痕、羊角弧、乌鸦羽影木片、兽皮绳结、赭土与灰烬、冰蓝生存火点

16:9 neutral prop master card。包含正视、侧视、背面或展开视图、手持/人物尺度参考、材质近景、磨损痕迹、结构分层和关键状态变体；画面使用中性背景，不当作最终视频帧。

硬锁：不得重画成单一狼头/狮头/可爱动物/怪物潮/金属高科技旗帜；所有北境服饰、盾鼓、皮帐、骨饰、誓约绳和旗面必须从同一骨木万兽誓结派生。物理尺度必须保持：徽章母版在参考卡中主图约20到32厘米等效；旗帜和盾鼓应用可扩展到帐门或战场尺度；徽章母版约20到32厘米等效；旗布版展示皮旗、盾牌、鼓面和绳结四种比例；骨木实体有2到12厘米厚度变化；皮旗和刻痕应用为平面/浅浮雕；骨木主徽厚重粗粝，皮旗轻但被绳结和骨片压住，适合低技术迁徙部族携带；骨片、角枝、旧木、兽皮绳、爪齿、皮旗和赭土颜料分层可读。必须展示从崭新母版到剧内磨损应用的连续关系：布面污雪、石刻裂纹、蜡封压痕、甲片磨损、袖口刺绣或旗边破损均不能改动根徽章几何。这是根符号母版，可展示清晰的几何设计、材质应用和尺度变体；后续精确复用必须从本母版派生线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成层。本卡就是后续派生的根参考。

参考图执行规则：本资产是根参考母版；生成时只建立当前资产的材质、尺度、磨损、轮廓和可控留白。若后续需要精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或文字痕迹，最终几何必须通过线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成锁定。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要崭新展示品感、万能神器化、现代工业产品感、过度发光、可读乱码、随机新徽章、随机文字、和剧情无关的装饰堆砌。

required_views: cloth flag or banner application view
seal, patch, armor, or stone application view
scale reference across costume, ruin, and prop use

composition_layers.foreground: locked root emblem geometry, flat emblem view, flag or banner application view, and precision line-control planning layer
composition_layers.midground: costume patch, seal, stone, wax, armor, cloth weathering, material wear, and derivative application crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain prop-card background with scale reference layer; transparent or line-control derivatives are separate deliverables

costume, seal, stone, wax, or armor application layer
precision line-control and transparent derivative note layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
approved root emblem geometry is preserved and not redesigned
flag, costume, ruin, seal, and prop applications derive from the same root emblem
exact emblem and flag geometry is not invented freely by the image model
transparent cutouts, masks, and SVG/PNG line-control layers are treated as separate required deliverables
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
related_required_deliverables: flag fabric mask and weathering guide
costume patch, seal, stone-carving, and prop application crops

usage: 主角分集状态卡服装母版

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent wardrobe cutouts must be planned separately if needed
required_views: scale reference on the intended body type

composition_layers.foreground: front, side, back, and three-quarter costume state views with readable silhouette
composition_layers.midground: fabric, trim, damage, rank, body-scale, and material-detail crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain costume-system board background with scale reference body or mannequin layer

composition_layer_notes: fabric and fastening detail crop layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
costume layers and material thickness remain readable
the intended body type and faction or region are clear
not treated as a final video frame
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
costume cards must show at least two readable non-gray hue families unless the asset contract explicitly defines an institutional white/black uniform
costume cards must keep poverty, damage, and age visible through stitching, wear, patches, dirt placement, and material texture rather than by washing every garment into the same gray
reject if gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filter becomes the dominant overall palette
reject if warm regional/faction/class colors are only tiny accents rather than the main readable color structure

reject if fewer than three readable hue families are present on costume, armor, civilian clothing, character, style-board, or usable scene cards unless a specific institutional uniform contract explicitly requires fewer
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series look or dominate both subject and background
related_required_deliverables: transparent wardrobe cutout planned separately if needed

旧感不得靠整体灰尘滤镜表达

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建沈维桑全剧/分季服装状态板，作为角色状态卡和镜头参考帧的服装母版。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。服装以中式交领、短襦/直裾、束带、绑腿、披风、护肩和边地实用裁剪为基础。色彩必须保留残阳坳与旧驿山路的土褐、草药青、旧皮棕和少量旧驿金赤；灰褐可以作为猎衣实用外层和旧化色保留，但不得把整张板压成灰暗主调。低魔痕迹只贴近衣料裂纹、旧驿路线光或局部磨损，不做高饱和魔法效果。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面展示沈维桑约173厘米、精瘦耐走的少年猎户体量。服装状态并列：残阳坳灰褐猎衣、清楚露出的草药青内层、旧皮棕护腕、路线包带；火后仅一小块衣角焦黑或局部烧缺；旧驿逃亡加层；边墙灰麻披风、旧皮肩护、雪线绑腿。草药青、旧皮棕和小面积旧驿金赤必须从灰褐外层中跳出来。左肩旧伤必须影响穿戴：左肩带更低，左袖活动余量更大，肩护固定略不对称。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral costume-system board。包含正面、侧面、背面、三分之四全身服装视图；分层穿法；束带、包带、护腕、肩护固定方式；左肩旧伤穿戴细节；布料、皮革、补丁、针脚、泥点、焦痕和磨薄边的局部裁切；以同一少年体量作尺度参考。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：灰褐猎衣、草药青内层、旧皮护腕、灰麻披风、旧皮肩护、雪线绑腿必须保持同一服装系统。灰/褐/黑只能是磨损底色，草药青、旧皮棕和旧驿金赤必须可读，非灰强调色面积不得太小；整体不得变成单一灰冷滤镜。升级只能来自逃亡、旧驿和边墙环境，不能变成军官甲、英雄华服、野蛮人破烂装或后末日流民装。旧、穷、简陋只能通过褪色、洗旧、补丁、针脚、局部污渍、边缘磨薄、肩背压痕和加固缝线表达；正常衣摆必须中式完整收边、可长期穿用。除明确火烧或战损小区域外，不出现撕裂下摆或碎布条。若出现徽记、字形、印章或旧驿痕迹，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要军官甲、英雄华服、法师袍、贵族宫装、北欧野蛮人皮毛破布、现代偶像猎人造型。 不要整体灰暗、不要灰尘滤镜吞掉草药青、不要所有状态同一种灰褐布、不要主体轮廓和中性背景融为一体。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

copy_ready.positive_prompt:
创建沈维桑全剧/分季服装状态板，作为角色状态卡和镜头参考帧的服装母版。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。服装以中式交领、短襦/直裾、束带、绑腿、披风、护肩和边地实用裁剪为基础。色彩必须保留残阳坳与旧驿山路的土褐、草药青、旧皮棕和少量旧驿金赤；灰褐可以作为猎衣实用外层和旧化色保留，但不得把整张板压成灰暗主调。低魔痕迹只贴近衣料裂纹、旧驿路线光或局部磨损，不做高饱和魔法效果。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。

画面展示沈维桑约173厘米、精瘦耐走的少年猎户体量。服装状态并列：残阳坳灰褐猎衣、清楚露出的草药青内层、旧皮棕护腕、路线包带；火后仅一小块衣角焦黑或局部烧缺；旧驿逃亡加层；边墙灰麻披风、旧皮肩护、雪线绑腿。草药青、旧皮棕和小面积旧驿金赤必须从灰褐外层中跳出来。左肩旧伤必须影响穿戴：左肩带更低，左袖活动余量更大，肩护固定略不对称。

reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
costume cards must show at least two readable non-gray hue families unless the asset contract explicitly defines an institutional white/black uniform
costume cards must keep poverty, damage, and age visible through stitching, wear, patches, dirt placement, and material texture rather than by washing every garment into the same gray
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建晏南枝全剧/分季服装状态板，作为流亡遮蔽状态和旧帝国身份揭示状态的服装母版。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。服装以中式交领、短襦/直裾、束带、绑腿、披风、护肩和边地实用裁剪为基础。她的服装线条要干净、修长、克制，贵气藏在雾紫、深墨蓝、红线、月白、朱赤、宝蓝和磨损金的材料层次里，不靠夸张首饰或宫廷堆砌；冷灰只能是遮蔽层，不得成为全图主宰。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面展示晏南枝约168厘米、清瘦修长的体量。流亡状态以雾紫外袍、少量冷灰遮蔽外层、深墨蓝内层、红线束发和藏匿的月白玉片为核心；旧帝国朱赤、宝蓝、月白、磨损金正装只作为回忆或身份揭示层展示，轮廓更挺、更有礼法感。雾紫、深墨蓝、红线、月白玉片和朱赤宝蓝正装必须清楚分层，不能被冷灰外袍统一压暗。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral costume-system board。并列流亡外袍、内层穿法、玉片藏匿方式、红线束发细节和身份揭示正装层；包含正面、侧面、背面、三分之四全身视图，袖口、领缘、腰带、挂绳、布料厚薄和旧痕局部裁切；以清瘦女性体量作尺度参考。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：雾紫外袍、冷灰外袍、深墨蓝内层、红线束发、月白玉片和旧帝国朱赤宝蓝月白正装必须属于同一身份系统。流亡装越压低越显眼，轮廓干净修长贵气；正装只用于回忆或身份揭示，不能在逃亡中外露。冷灰只能占遮蔽外层，雾紫、深墨蓝、红线、月白、朱赤、宝蓝和磨损金必须形成可读色彩路径。旧和简陋只能通过褪色、洗旧、细小补丁、针脚、局部污渍、边缘磨薄表达；正常衣摆必须完整收边，不出现碎布条。若出现旧帝国纹样或印章，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要逃亡中外露女帝正装、凤冠霞帔、过度宫装、仙侠飘带、现代礼服、廉价舞台贵族服。 不要全身冷灰、不要把雾紫和深墨蓝洗成灰布、不要逃亡装变成普通灰衣流民、不要身份揭示正装缺少朱赤宝蓝月白。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

copy_ready.chatgpt_image_prompt:
请根据以下六段结构生成一张电影级资产参考图。

创建晏南枝全剧/分季服装状态板，作为流亡遮蔽状态和旧帝国身份揭示状态的服装母版。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。服装以中式交领、短襦/直裾、束带、绑腿、披风、护肩和边地实用裁剪为基础。她的服装线条要干净、修长、克制，贵气藏在雾紫、深墨蓝、红线、月白、朱赤、宝蓝和磨损金的材料层次里，不靠夸张首饰或宫廷堆砌；冷灰只能是遮蔽层，不得成为全图主宰。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。

画面展示晏南枝约168厘米、清瘦修长的体量。流亡状态以雾紫外袍、少量冷灰遮蔽外层、深墨蓝内层、红线束发和藏匿的月白玉片为核心；旧帝国朱赤、宝蓝、月白、磨损金正装只作为回忆或身份揭示层展示，轮廓更挺、更有礼法感。雾紫、深墨蓝、红线、月白玉片和朱赤宝蓝正装必须清楚分层，不能被冷灰外袍统一压暗。

16:9 neutral costume-system board。并列流亡外袍、内层穿法、玉片藏匿方式、红线束发细节和身份揭示正装层；包含正面、侧面、背面、三分之四全身视图，袖口、领缘、腰带、挂绳、布料厚薄和旧痕局部裁切；以清瘦女性体量作尺度参考。

硬锁：雾紫外袍、冷灰外袍、深墨蓝内层、红线束发、月白玉片和旧帝国朱赤宝蓝月白正装必须属于同一身份系统。流亡装越压低越显眼，轮廓干净修长贵气；正装只用于回忆或身份揭示，不能在逃亡中外露。冷灰只能占遮蔽外层，雾紫、深墨蓝、红线、月白、朱赤、宝蓝和磨损金必须形成可读色彩路径。旧和简陋只能通过褪色、洗旧、细小补丁、针脚、局部污渍、边缘磨薄表达；正常衣摆必须完整收边，不出现碎布条。若出现旧帝国纹样或印章，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要逃亡中外露女帝正装、凤冠霞帔、过度宫装、仙侠飘带、现代礼服、廉价舞台贵族服。 不要全身冷灰、不要把雾紫和深墨蓝洗成灰布、不要逃亡装变成普通灰衣流民、不要身份揭示正装缺少朱赤宝蓝月白。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

copy_ready.reference_image_instructions: 参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent wardrobe cutouts must be planned separately if needed
required_views: scale reference on the intended body type

composition_layers.foreground: front, side, back, and three-quarter costume state views with readable silhouette
composition_layers.midground: fabric, trim, damage, rank, body-scale, and material-detail crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain costume-system board background with scale reference body or mannequin layer

composition_layer_notes: fabric and fastening detail crop layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
costume layers and material thickness remain readable
the intended body type and faction or region are clear
not treated as a final video frame
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
costume cards must show at least two readable non-gray hue families unless the asset contract explicitly defines an institutional white/black uniform
costume cards must keep poverty, damage, and age visible through stitching, wear, patches, dirt placement, and material texture rather than by washing every garment into the same gray
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background
related_required_deliverables: transparent wardrobe cutout planned separately if needed

required_palette: 雾紫外袍
冷灰外袍只作遮蔽外层
深墨蓝内层
红线束发
月白玉片
身份揭示层使用朱赤、宝蓝、月白和磨损金
separation_rules: 雾紫、深墨蓝、红线和月白必须同时可读
流亡遮蔽不能把晏南枝画成普通灰衣逃荒者
旧帝国正装层的朱赤、宝蓝、磨损金必须比冷灰外袍更醒目

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

prompt_revision.reason: B06 costume visual revision: reject ragged shredded-hems as shorthand for poverty/age; enforce complete Chinese-style garment construction and P017 black-sun white-wing emblem for Suming official uniforms.

qc_notes: 3840x2160 RGB PNG; existing canonical costume board retained from earlier B06 generation.

usage: 儿童识别者状态连续

visible_lock_injection.visible_prompt_policy: Model-visible text contains visual constraints only. Raw asset IDs, output paths, source refs, and usage notes remain in production_metadata; semantic asset names may be visible.

草药绿小围裙
烧焦发绳
清明院白色儿童袍

separation_rules: 草药绿围裙必须从浅灰短襦中分离
白袍状态要靠虫蜡质感、冷金识别环和儿童体量区分，不得变成一块白灰布
发绳和草药袋是亲情锚点，不能被灰尘滤镜吞掉

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建沈照眠双状态服装板，作为儿童识别者在村中状态和清明院状态之间的服装连续性母版。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。儿童服装必须保留轻软、脆弱和被制度压住的身体感；村中状态用浅灰短襦搭配明确草药绿小围裙，清明院状态用虫蜡白、冷金识别环和硬洗白袍表达制度压迫，不能把两个状态都画成灰白童装。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面展示沈照眠约130厘米儿童体量。村中状态包含浅灰短襦、清楚可见的草药绿小围裙、简单布鞋、烧焦发绳和小草药袋；清明院状态包含干净白色儿童袍、虫蜡识别环、少量冷金或蜡白反光和被训练出的束直站姿。白袍状态仍要看出孩子身体小、肩窄、手脚轻，不能抹掉发绳、草药袋或草药绿村中锚点。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral costume-system board。左右并列村中状态与清明院状态，包含正面、侧面、背面、三分之四儿童全身视图；发绳烧焦边、草药袋、识别环、袖口、衣摆、布鞋、白袍硬洗质感和儿童尺度对照的局部裁切。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：浅灰短襦、草药绿小围裙、烧焦发绳、白色儿童袍、虫蜡识别环必须共同证明这是同一个孩子的状态变化。草药绿、烧焦发绳、草药袋和虫蜡识别环必须可读；清明院白袍可以更干净、更硬、更制度化，但不能让孩子变成无个性的灰白童子，也不能抹掉发绳和草药袋锚点。旧感只能通过洗旧、补丁、针脚、局部污渍和边缘磨薄表达；正常衣摆完整收边，不使用碎布条。若出现识别环痕迹或章痕，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要成人化儿童、仙童、现代校服、医院病号服、科幻实验服、过度可爱化、抹除烧焦发绳或草药袋。 不要两个状态都灰白、不要草药绿围裙消失、不要白袍和中性背景融成一片、不要成人化儿童。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
costume cards must show at least two readable non-gray hue families unless the asset contract explicitly defines an institutional white/black uniform
costume cards must keep poverty, damage, and age visible through stitching, wear, patches, dirt placement, and material texture rather than by washing every garment into the same gray
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建肃明清明院服制层级板，作为虫族官吏、奴兵、士兵和清明院制度视觉的服装母版。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。肃明服制以虫蜡白、骨白、黑日白翅、蜡灰青、绯色印绳和少量冷金构成制度色彩；允许白黑对比强，但必须层级清楚，不得把所有官吏、奴兵和士兵都画成灰白或黑灰制服。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面分层展示白翳高帽、白翳高筒官帽、基层虫吏短冠、基层虫吏较低高账吏帽、奴兵剃除头皮、奴兵低位金钱马尾、虫须触须束、骨白腕绑、虫蜡白官袍、蜡灰青短军袍、绯色印绳、少量冷金，以及从已批准黑日白翅根徽章派生的黑日牌、胸牌、袖章、帽牌或腰牌。普通官吏、奴兵、纯虫小兵和重甲虫士兵必须靠白/黑/蜡灰青/绯色/冷金层级区分。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral costume-system board。按清明院层级从高官到奴兵、士兵排列正面、侧面、背面、三分之四视图；包含帽形、触须束、金钱马尾、剃除头皮、腕绑、胸牌/袖章/帽牌、官袍和短军袍材料裁切；以人族、白翳和厉螳的尺度差异作参照。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：必须区分虫须触须束和奴兵低位金钱马尾，不能让所有虫族都像白翳，也不能全部画成怪物。白翳高帽、基层虫吏短冠、奴兵剃除头皮、骨白腕绑、虫蜡白官袍、蜡灰青短军袍、黑日牌、黑日白翅牌、绯色印绳和冷金层级件必须属于同一肃明/清明院服制系统。此卡允许制度白/黑比例高，但必须有蜡灰青、绯色或冷金层级差异；不能所有服制灰蒙蒙。胸牌、袖章、帽牌和腰牌只能从已批准黑日白翅根徽章派生；如果无法精确，使用空白线控牌或留白承载物，不要生成虫子身体、甲虫图标、抽象怪物符号或新徽章。旧感只通过褪色、蜡灰污痕、压痕、磨边和加固缝线表达，衣摆和官服结构保持完整。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代制服、医院标志、昆虫身体徽章、甲虫 logo、所有角色同一种脸、所有虫族同一种怪物外观、无层级的怪物群。 不要所有层级同一种灰白官服、不要灰蒙蒙官服、不要黑日白翅徽记低对比、不要制度白袍和中性背景融为一体。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

copy_ready.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代制服、医院标志、昆虫身体徽章、甲虫 logo、所有角色同一种脸、所有虫族同一种怪物外观、无层级的怪物群。 不要所有层级同一种灰白官服、不要灰蒙蒙官服、不要黑日白翅徽记低对比、不要制度白袍和中性背景融为一体。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。
copy_ready.chatgpt_image_prompt:
请根据以下六段结构生成一张电影级资产参考图。

创建肃明清明院服制层级板，作为虫族官吏、奴兵、士兵和清明院制度视觉的服装母版。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。肃明服制以虫蜡白、骨白、黑日白翅、蜡灰青、绯色印绳和少量冷金构成制度色彩；允许白黑对比强，但必须层级清楚，不得把所有官吏、奴兵和士兵都画成灰白或黑灰制服。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。

画面分层展示白翳高帽、白翳高筒官帽、基层虫吏短冠、基层虫吏较低高账吏帽、奴兵剃除头皮、奴兵低位金钱马尾、虫须触须束、骨白腕绑、虫蜡白官袍、蜡灰青短军袍、绯色印绳、少量冷金，以及从已批准黑日白翅根徽章派生的黑日牌、胸牌、袖章、帽牌或腰牌。普通官吏、奴兵、纯虫小兵和重甲虫士兵必须靠白/黑/蜡灰青/绯色/冷金层级区分。

16:9 neutral costume-system board。按清明院层级从高官到奴兵、士兵排列正面、侧面、背面、三分之四视图；包含帽形、触须束、金钱马尾、剃除头皮、腕绑、胸牌/袖章/帽牌、官袍和短军袍材料裁切；以人族、白翳和厉螳的尺度差异作参照。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要现代制服、医院标志、昆虫身体徽章、甲虫 logo、所有角色同一种脸、所有虫族同一种怪物外观、无层级的怪物群。 不要所有层级同一种灰白官服、不要灰蒙蒙官服、不要黑日白翅徽记低对比、不要制度白袍和中性背景融为一体。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent wardrobe cutouts must be planned separately if needed
required_views: scale reference on the intended body type

composition_layers.foreground: front, side, back, and three-quarter costume state views with readable silhouette
composition_layers.midground: fabric, trim, damage, rank, body-scale, and material-detail crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain costume-system board background with scale reference body or mannequin layer

composition_layer_notes: fabric and fastening detail crop layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
costume layers and material thickness remain readable
the intended body type and faction or region are clear
not treated as a final video frame
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
costume cards must show at least two readable non-gray hue families unless the asset contract explicitly defines an institutional white/black uniform
costume cards must keep poverty, damage, and age visible through stitching, wear, patches, dirt placement, and material texture rather than by washing every garment into the same gray
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background
related_required_deliverables: transparent wardrobe cutout planned separately if needed

required_palette: 虫蜡白和骨白为制度主色
黑日白翅徽记为高对比黑白图形
蜡灰青短军袍
绯色或冷金小面积层级标记
奴兵杂旧甲不可统一黑灰
separation_rules: 此卡允许制度白/黑比例高，但必须有黑日白翅、蜡灰青、绯色或冷金层级差异
官吏、奴兵、纯虫小兵、重甲虫士兵不能都变成同一种灰白制服
白衣与中性背景之间必须有阴影、边缘线或冷金/黑日对比

warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

visible_lock_injection.visible_prompt_policy: Model-visible text contains visual constraints only. Raw asset IDs, output paths, source refs, and usage notes remain in production_metadata; semantic asset names may be visible.

required_palette: 枯草黄
冻土灰只作地面/底色
风蚀褐兽皮
骨白骨片
冰蓝或低饱和天青冷光
暗血誓绳
separation_rules: 鹿族、狼族、熊族、牛族、鸦族必须靠色相、材质、厚度和挂件秩序区分
北境粗粝不能等于统一灰色兽皮兵
暗血誓绳、骨白、枯草黄和冰蓝必须提供族群层级提示

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建北境诸族服装材质层级板，作为鹿族、狼族、熊族、牛族、鸦族等北境群体的服装差异母版。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。北境服装要体现寒地迁徙、饥饿、部族阶层和战场职能，材料粗粝但有实际穿戴逻辑。色彩必须保留枯草黄、风蚀褐、骨白、冰蓝/低饱和天青和暗血誓绳，冻土灰只作底色，不得统一成灰色兽皮兵。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面按族群和职能分区展示冻裂兽皮内层、厚毛边披挂、骨片护肩、旧木护胸、兽皮绳、暗血誓绳、雪泥绑腿、血盐袋和骨笛绳。鹿族贵族、狼族斥候、白熊护卫、牛族盾兵、雪羽斥候要有不同肩背宽度、行动方式、材料厚度、挂件秩序和色彩锚点：枯草黄、风蚀褐、骨白、冰蓝、暗血誓绳必须在不同族群中形成差异。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral costume-system board。按鹿族、狼族、熊族、牛族、鸦族分区排列正面、侧面、背面、三分之四全身服装视图；包含兽皮、毛边、骨片、旧木护胸、绳结、血盐袋、骨笛绳、雪泥绑腿和磨损痕迹的局部裁切；用北境具名角色和攻城兵体量作尺度校准。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：北境军服不是统一制式，必须体现族群、阶层、战场职能和迁徙消耗。兽皮内层、骨片护肩、旧木护胸、暗血誓绳、雪泥绑腿、血盐袋、骨笛绳必须形成北境材料系统，但每个族群的剪影、肩背比例、挂件秩序、行动用途和色彩锚点要清楚不同。冻土灰只能作环境或底色，枯草黄、风蚀褐、骨白、冰蓝和暗血誓绳必须可读。旧和简陋只能通过褪色、洗旧、补丁、针脚、雪泥污渍、磨薄边和加固绳结表达；正常衣摆或皮缘保持实用收边，不使用碎布条。若出现部族徽记或誓约符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要统一灰色兽皮兵、单一野蛮人皮毛破布、可爱动物吉祥物、单一狼头/狮头标志、怪物潮、金属高科技旗帜、现代户外装备。 不要统一灰色兽皮兵、不要所有族群只换武器不换色彩和材质、不要冻土灰覆盖全图、不要乞丐破布化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

创建北境诸族服装材质层级板，作为鹿族、狼族、熊族、牛族、鸦族等北境群体的服装差异母版。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。北境服装要体现寒地迁徙、饥饿、部族阶层和战场职能，材料粗粝但有实际穿戴逻辑。色彩必须保留枯草黄、风蚀褐、骨白、冰蓝/低饱和天青和暗血誓绳，冻土灰只作底色，不得统一成灰色兽皮兵。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。

画面按族群和职能分区展示冻裂兽皮内层、厚毛边披挂、骨片护肩、旧木护胸、兽皮绳、暗血誓绳、雪泥绑腿、血盐袋和骨笛绳。鹿族贵族、狼族斥候、白熊护卫、牛族盾兵、雪羽斥候要有不同肩背宽度、行动方式、材料厚度、挂件秩序和色彩锚点：枯草黄、风蚀褐、骨白、冰蓝、暗血誓绳必须在不同族群中形成差异。

16:9 neutral costume-system board。按鹿族、狼族、熊族、牛族、鸦族分区排列正面、侧面、背面、三分之四全身服装视图；包含兽皮、毛边、骨片、旧木护胸、绳结、血盐袋、骨笛绳、雪泥绑腿和磨损痕迹的局部裁切；用北境具名角色和攻城兵体量作尺度校准。

硬锁：北境军服不是统一制式，必须体现族群、阶层、战场职能和迁徙消耗。兽皮内层、骨片护肩、旧木护胸、暗血誓绳、雪泥绑腿、血盐袋、骨笛绳必须形成北境材料系统，但每个族群的剪影、肩背比例、挂件秩序、行动用途和色彩锚点要清楚不同。冻土灰只能作环境或底色，枯草黄、风蚀褐、骨白、冰蓝和暗血誓绳必须可读。旧和简陋只能通过褪色、洗旧、补丁、针脚、雪泥污渍、磨薄边和加固绳结表达；正常衣摆或皮缘保持实用收边，不使用碎布条。若出现部族徽记或誓约符号，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要统一灰色兽皮兵、单一野蛮人皮毛破布、可爱动物吉祥物、单一狼头/狮头标志、怪物潮、金属高科技旗帜、现代户外装备。 不要统一灰色兽皮兵、不要所有族群只换武器不换色彩和材质、不要冻土灰覆盖全图、不要乞丐破布化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
costume cards must show at least two readable non-gray hue families unless the asset contract explicitly defines an institutional white/black uniform
costume cards must keep poverty, damage, and age visible through stitching, wear, patches, dirt placement, and material texture rather than by washing every garment into the same gray
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建人族地域群众服装差异板，作为残阳坳、金河、旧都渡口、边墙和南缘等地区群像服装母版。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。群众服装要服务社会功能和地域压力，贫困可见但不能把所有人画成同款破布背景人。必须按地域分色：残阳坳土褐/麦金/草药青，金河深河青/湿木褐/蒸汽白/暗粮牌黄，旧都渡口旧染蓝和旧白石粉，边墙黑石/旧铁/干血暗红/雪线白，南缘防潮油布/红线/草药袋/旧染边。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面并列残阳坳山民、金河粮仓带平民、征粮逃荒家庭、旧都渡口遗民、边墙军户和南缘遗民。每类人群的衣料、补丁位置、职业工具、地域痕迹、贫困程度、年龄、性别和色彩锚点必须清楚：山民有草药青和山路土褐，粮仓带有深河青、湿木褐和暗粮牌黄，逃荒家庭有包袱和省布修补但保留原地域色，旧都渡口遗民有旧染蓝和旧白石粉痕，边墙军户有黑石旧铁和干血暗红，南缘遗民有红线、防潮油布和旧染边。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 neutral costume-system board。按地域分区排列小组全身视图、正侧背服装局部、职业工具和材料裁切；同一画面至少三类年龄、职业或地域差异并列；展示粗布、麻绳、防潮油布、补丁、旧甲片、雨痕、泥点和衣缘收边。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：人族群众不能统一成破布流民、乞丐队伍或同款灰麻背景人；同场至少三类年龄、职业、地域或贫困程度差异。残阳坳山民、金河粮仓平民、逃荒家庭、旧都渡口遗民、边墙军户、南缘遗民必须能通过衣料、工具、补丁位置、地域污痕、体态和色彩锚点区分。灰麻、河泥灰、黑石灰只能是局部底色；土褐、麦金、草药青、深河青、湿木褐、旧染蓝、干血暗红、红线和旧染边必须可读。旧和简陋只能通过褪色、洗旧、补丁、针脚、局部污渍、边缘磨薄、肩背压痕和加固缝线表达；正常衣摆必须中式完整收边、可长期穿用。若出现地方案牍、粮牌或印记，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要同款灰麻 NPC、统一乞丐队伍、现代农民工服、现代背包、现代鞋、随机可读招牌、把所有人画成同一年龄同一职业。 不要同款灰麻 NPC、不要所有人一个灰褐色相、不要把残阳坳/金河/旧都/边墙/南缘画成同一服装系统、不要整体去饱和贫困滤镜。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

copy_ready.positive_prompt:
创建人族地域群众服装差异板，作为残阳坳、金河、旧都渡口、边墙和南缘等地区群像服装母版。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；材料真实、有重量、有磨损。群众服装要服务社会功能和地域压力，贫困可见但不能把所有人画成同款破布背景人。必须按地域分色：残阳坳土褐/麦金/草药青，金河深河青/湿木褐/蒸汽白/暗粮牌黄，旧都渡口旧染蓝和旧白石粉，边墙黑石/旧铁/干血暗红/雪线白，南缘防潮油布/红线/草药袋/旧染边。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：服装色彩服从地域、势力、阶层、职业、年龄和剧情状态；旧、穷、军制、寒冷和逃亡不能靠全员灰麻或整板灰褐表达。灰褐、冷灰、黑灰可作为旧皮革、旧麻布、路尘、磨损、阴影和材质条件色使用，但不得成为统一滤镜。衣料层次、修补、甲片、绑带、内外层和身份色必须可读，角色放入场景后不能与墙地烟雪融成一块。

画面并列残阳坳山民、金河粮仓带平民、征粮逃荒家庭、旧都渡口遗民、边墙军户和南缘遗民。每类人群的衣料、补丁位置、职业工具、地域痕迹、贫困程度、年龄、性别和色彩锚点必须清楚：山民有草药青和山路土褐，粮仓带有深河青、湿木褐和暗粮牌黄，逃荒家庭有包袱和省布修补但保留原地域色，旧都渡口遗民有旧染蓝和旧白石粉痕，边墙军户有黑石旧铁和干血暗红，南缘遗民有红线、防潮油布和旧染边。

16:9 neutral costume-system board。按地域分区排列小组全身视图、正侧背服装局部、职业工具和材料裁切；同一画面至少三类年龄、职业或地域差异并列；展示粗布、麻绳、防潮油布、补丁、旧甲片、雨痕、泥点和衣缘收边。

硬锁：人族群众不能统一成破布流民、乞丐队伍或同款灰麻背景人；同场至少三类年龄、职业、地域或贫困程度差异。残阳坳山民、金河粮仓平民、逃荒家庭、旧都渡口遗民、边墙军户、南缘遗民必须能通过衣料、工具、补丁位置、地域污痕、体态和色彩锚点区分。灰麻、河泥灰、黑石灰只能是局部底色；土褐、麦金、草药青、深河青、湿木褐、旧染蓝、干血暗红、红线和旧染边必须可读。旧和简陋只能通过褪色、洗旧、补丁、针脚、局部污渍、边缘磨薄、肩背压痕和加固缝线表达；正常衣摆必须中式完整收边、可长期穿用。若出现地方案牍、粮牌或印记，只做抽象可控痕迹；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。 服装、盔甲、平民衣着必须通过至少三组可读色相体现地域、阶层、势力、职业或年龄差异；贫穷、旧化、战损只能通过材质、补丁、针脚、污渍位置和边缘磨损表达，不能把所有衣物洗成灰褐。
copy_ready.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、游戏化盔甲、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态。不要满身碎布条、乞丐化、后末日流民感、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要同款灰麻 NPC、统一乞丐队伍、现代农民工服、现代背包、现代鞋、随机可读招牌、把所有人画成同一年龄同一职业。 不要同款灰麻 NPC、不要所有人一个灰褐色相、不要把残阳坳/金河/旧都/边墙/南缘画成同一服装系统、不要整体去饱和贫困滤镜。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

copy_ready.reference_image_instructions: 参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent wardrobe cutouts must be planned separately if needed
required_views: scale reference on the intended body type

composition_layers.foreground: front, side, back, and three-quarter costume state views with readable silhouette
composition_layers.midground: fabric, trim, damage, rank, body-scale, and material-detail crop layers
composition_layers.background: neutral plain costume-system board background with scale reference body or mannequin layer

composition_layer_notes: fabric and fastening detail crop layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
costume layers and material thickness remain readable
the intended body type and faction or region are clear
not treated as a final video frame
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
costume cards must show at least two readable non-gray hue families unless the asset contract explicitly defines an institutional white/black uniform
costume cards must keep poverty, damage, and age visible through stitching, wear, patches, dirt placement, and material texture rather than by washing every garment into the same gray
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background
related_required_deliverables: transparent wardrobe cutout planned separately if needed

required_palette: 残阳坳土褐、麦金、草药青
金河深河青、湿木褐、蒸汽白、暗粮牌黄
旧都渡口旧染蓝/旧白石粉
边墙黑石、旧铁、干血暗红、雪线白
南缘防潮油布、红线、草药袋和旧染边
separation_rules: 六类人族地域群众必须一眼能用颜色和工具分组
普通平民、逃荒家庭、边墙军户、南缘遗民不能共用同一种灰麻布
贫穷必须通过补丁位置、职业工具、污渍来源和衣缘收边表达，不得靠整体去饱和表达

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

prompt_revision.reason: B06 costume visual revision: reject ragged shredded-hems as shorthand for poverty/age; enforce complete Chinese-style garment construction and P017 black-sun white-wing emblem for Suming official uniforms.

qc_notes: Regenerated canonical board: human regional/class wardrobe differences are readable with intact old Chinese-style garment construction and sewn repairs instead of shredded-rag shorthand.

usage: 全剧视觉风格总板
production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_file; retained intermediates go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: palette, material, lighting, low-magic, and composition example swatches
composition_layers.midground: continuity rules, allowed examples, prohibited examples, and downstream application notes
composition_layers.background: designed neutral style-board canvas without video-frame staging

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters
style_reference_data.color_palette or equivalent style tokens are represented as visual swatches or material samples without readable labels
material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
reject if gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filter becomes the dominant overall palette
reject if warm regional/faction/class colors are only tiny accents rather than the main readable color structure

reject if fewer than three readable hue families are present on costume, armor, civilian clothing, character, style-board, or usable scene cards unless a specific institutional uniform contract explicitly requires fewer
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series look or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: condition/material/supporting color only
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: warm and chromatic regional/faction/class anchors must be the main read

material_system.surface: grain-visible old timber with smoke, hand oil, and water stains
material_system.reflectance: low, broken satin only on handled edges
material_system.wear_rules: chips, soot at corners, rubbed pale edges, never varnished modern wood

material_system.surface: smooth wax-sealed institutional surface with faint cloudy translucency
material_system.reflectance: soft waxy highlights, no glossy plastic
material_system.wear_rules: sealed seams, pressed black-sun marks, needle scratches, dustless violence
material_system.usage: 清明院墙面、封条、记忆针、白册章

material_system.surface: coarse black stone with snow packed into cracks
material_system.reflectance: very low, wet edge glints only
material_system.wear_rules: frost cracks, wind-polished corners, dry blood in cuts, snow accumulation on ledges
material_system.usage: 边墙、锁喉关、寒鸦堡、绝境山脉

material_system.surface: wet river wood, iron grime, steam condensation
material_system.reflectance: low on wood, dull on iron, white steam glow only as haze
material_system.wear_rules: water tide marks, oil black smears, rope stains, softened edges
material_system.usage: 金河粮磨、水泵、码头、粮仓生产线

material_system.surface: charred paper, ash dust, cracked copper, brittle seal fragments
material_system.reflectance: copper has dull broken glints only
material_system.wear_rules: burnt edges, ash transfer, copper verdigris, moon-white dust on ridges
material_system.usage: 灰烬书院、碎星图、封条、禁书残页

material_system.surface: rough linen with herb stains, sweat, smoke and field dust
material_system.reflectance: none except damp darker patches
material_system.wear_rules: frayed seams, patched elbows, herb-powder smears, soot on corners

material_system.surface: old raised metal with exposed warm gold on edges only
material_system.reflectance: muted glint on raised cuts, no polished palace shine
material_system.wear_rules: edge wear, blackened recesses, cracked enamel, missing flakes
material_system.usage: 昭明令牌、旧帝国遗迹、日月残纹、盟书印记

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建全剧低魔东方史诗风格板，作为全剧共享视觉规则参考板。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：风格板要规定场景情绪随剧情变化，而不是提供统一灰褐滤镜。必须能支持明亮的故土美景、阴暗的制度空间、宏伟的边关/旧城、寒冷的北境、破坏后的灰烬和人物可读性；灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘只作为条件色和材质色。

硬锁：不能喜剧化、爽剧化、宫廷斗嘴化或高魔法化；所有动作有真实重心和代价。风格板可以显示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得显示可读标签、色名、编号、界面元素或说明文字。若涉及徽章、旗帜、印章或文字痕迹，只展示抽象承载物和材质示例；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 风格板必须把地域、势力、阶层的暖多色路线作为主视觉，而不是把灰、褐、黑、雪白统一成全剧滤镜。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

material_system.surface: coarse black stone with snow packed into cracks

material_system.surface: wet river wood, iron grime, steam condensation

material_system.surface: charred paper, ash dust, cracked copper, brittle seal fragments

material_system.surface: rough linen with herb stains, sweat, smoke and field dust
material_system.reflectance: none except damp darker patches
material_system.wear_rules: frayed seams, patched elbows, herb-powder smears, soot on corners

material_system.surface: old raised metal with exposed warm gold on edges only

material_system.wear_rules: edge wear, blackened recesses, cracked enamel, missing flakes

lighting_rules.usage: 逃亡、村落、边墙外景；保留真实体重和接触阴影

创建第一季地域色彩路线板，作为全剧共享视觉规则参考板。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：风格板要规定场景情绪随剧情变化，而不是提供统一灰褐滤镜。必须能支持明亮的故土美景、阴暗的制度空间、宏伟的边关/旧城、寒冷的北境、破坏后的灰烬和人物可读性；灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘只作为条件色和材质色。

第一季地域色彩路线板，从残阳坳土褐麦金草药青，到金河深河青蒸汽白，再到灰烬书院焦黑纸灰、清明院虫蜡白骨白、边墙黑石雪白、北境枯草冻土和月下旧驿月白磨损金。核心视觉锚点：人族生活中心、金河生产线、灰烬书院、清明院、边墙、北境、旧帝国遗迹。应用范围：分场景调色与材质连续性

16:9 style reference board。使用分区版式展示色彩关系、材质样片、构图缩略、光效边界、正确方向与禁用方向；信息清晰但不做图文海报，画面中不得出现可读标签或编号。

硬锁：全剧不能统一成单一灰冷逃亡色；每个地域有社会功能、材质和天气压力。风格板可以显示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得显示可读标签、色名、编号、界面元素或说明文字。若涉及徽章、旗帜、印章或文字痕迹，只展示抽象承载物和材质示例；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 风格板必须把地域、势力、阶层的暖多色路线作为主视觉，而不是把灰、褐、黑、雪白统一成全剧滤镜。
copy_ready.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

composition_layers.foreground: palette, material, lighting, low-magic, and composition example swatches
composition_layers.midground: continuity rules, allowed examples, prohibited examples, and downstream application notes
composition_layers.background: designed neutral style-board canvas without video-frame staging

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters
style_reference_data.color_palette or equivalent style tokens are represented as visual swatches or material samples without readable labels
material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

style_reference_data.palette_display_policy: Render route palettes as visual bands and environment swatches; do not render region names or HEX codes as readable text in the image.

material_system.usage: 清明院墙面、封条、记忆针、白册章

material_system.surface: coarse black stone with snow packed into cracks
material_system.reflectance: very low, wet edge glints only
material_system.wear_rules: frost cracks, wind-polished corners, dry blood in cuts, snow accumulation on ledges
material_system.usage: 边墙、锁喉关、寒鸦堡、绝境山脉

material_system.surface: wet river wood, iron grime, steam condensation
material_system.reflectance: low on wood, dull on iron, white steam glow only as haze
material_system.wear_rules: water tide marks, oil black smears, rope stains, softened edges
material_system.usage: 金河粮磨、水泵、码头、粮仓生产线

material_system.surface: bone, dull iron, hide, fur, rope and blood-salt wear
material_system.reflectance: very low except worn iron scratches
material_system.wear_rules: stitched repairs, bite marks, salt bloom, cracked leather, bone polish at grip points
material_system.usage: 北境盾鼓、皮帐、兽具、骨笛、攻城兵种

material_system.surface: charred paper, ash dust, cracked copper, brittle seal fragments
material_system.reflectance: copper has dull broken glints only
material_system.wear_rules: burnt edges, ash transfer, copper verdigris, moon-white dust on ridges
material_system.usage: 灰烬书院、碎星图、封条、禁书残页

material_system.surface: rough linen with herb stains, sweat, smoke and field dust
material_system.reflectance: none except damp darker patches
material_system.wear_rules: frayed seams, patched elbows, herb-powder smears, soot on corners
material_system.usage: 猎户、药户、山路护送、旧驿后裔服装

material_system.surface: old raised metal with exposed warm gold on edges only
material_system.reflectance: muted glint on raised cuts, no polished palace shine
material_system.wear_rules: edge wear, blackened recesses, cracked enamel, missing flakes
material_system.usage: 昭明令牌、旧帝国遗迹、日月残纹、盟书印记

material_system.surface: porous old imperial stone with chips, dust and old carving scars
material_system.reflectance: chalky low reflectance
material_system.wear_rules: corner chips, soot in carved lines, snow or dust settled in cuts
material_system.usage: 白曜旧都、旧驿、月下盟书石台

visible_lock_injection.visible_prompt_policy: Model-visible text contains visual constraints only. Raw asset IDs, output paths, source refs, and usage notes remain in production_metadata; semantic asset names may be visible.

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建核心材质触感板，作为全剧共享视觉规则参考板。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：风格板要规定场景情绪随剧情变化，而不是提供统一灰褐滤镜。必须能支持明亮的故土美景、阴暗的制度空间、宏伟的边关/旧城、寒冷的北境、破坏后的灰烬和人物可读性；灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘只作为条件色和材质色。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 核心材质触感板，虫蜡白、旧白石、黑石雪线、湿木蒸汽、骨铁兽皮、纸灰裂铜、草药布料和磨损金以近景纹理与中景应用并列，强调可触摸的古代材料。核心视觉锚点：虫蜡白、旧白石、黑石雪线、湿木蒸汽、骨铁兽皮、纸灰裂铜、磨损金。应用范围：资产生成材质基准
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 style reference board。使用分区版式展示色彩关系、材质样片、构图缩略、光效边界、正确方向与禁用方向；信息清晰但不做图文海报，画面中不得出现可读标签或编号。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：避免塑料 CGI、过度干净、现代工业纹理或单纯滤镜化；材质必须服务剧情空间。风格板可以显示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得显示可读标签、色名、编号、界面元素或说明文字。若涉及徽章、旗帜、印章或文字痕迹，只展示抽象承载物和材质示例；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 风格板必须把地域、势力、阶层的暖多色路线作为主视觉，而不是把灰、褐、黑、雪白统一成全剧滤镜。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: palette, material, lighting, low-magic, and composition example swatches
composition_layers.midground: continuity rules, allowed examples, prohibited examples, and downstream application notes
composition_layers.background: designed neutral style-board canvas without video-frame staging

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters
style_reference_data.color_palette or equivalent style tokens are represented as visual swatches or material samples without readable labels
material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

material_system.surface: smooth wax-sealed institutional surface with faint cloudy translucency
material_system.reflectance: soft waxy highlights, no glossy plastic
material_system.wear_rules: sealed seams, pressed black-sun marks, needle scratches, dustless violence

material_system.wear_rules: frost cracks, wind-polished corners, dry blood in cuts, snow accumulation on ledges

material_system.surface: wet river wood, iron grime, steam condensation
material_system.reflectance: low on wood, dull on iron, white steam glow only as haze

material_system.surface: charred paper, ash dust, cracked copper, brittle seal fragments

material_system.surface: old raised metal with exposed warm gold on edges only

material_system.wear_rules: edge wear, blackened recesses, cracked enamel, missing flakes

material_system.surface: porous old imperial stone with chips, dust and old carving scars

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建势力符号与禁用标志板，作为全剧共享视觉规则参考板。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：风格板要规定场景情绪随剧情变化，而不是提供统一灰褐滤镜。必须能支持明亮的故土美景、阴暗的制度空间、宏伟的边关/旧城、寒冷的北境、破坏后的灰烬和人物可读性；灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘只作为条件色和材质色。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 势力符号与禁用标志板，必须以三势力根徽章旗帜为根参考，展示昭明、肃明、北境如何延展到材质、服饰、遗迹、封条、旗布和道具；灰墙军和墙下混裔只做物件化标记，不新增国家徽章。核心视觉锚点：昭明日月星盘根徽章旗帜、肃明黑日白翅根徽章旗帜、北境骨木万兽根徽章旗帜、灰墙军旧甲压痕、墙下无籍交易牌。应用范围：徽记和符号后合成策略
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9 style reference board。使用分区版式展示色彩关系、材质样片、构图缩略、光效边界、正确方向与禁用方向；信息清晰但不做图文海报，画面中不得出现可读标签或编号。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：不得重做三势力根徽章；精确符号必须线控或透明图层后合成；不得生成新北境单一动物徽章、现代 logo、水印或乱码文字。风格板可以显示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得显示可读标签、色名、编号、界面元素或说明文字。三势力符号只展示已批准根系统的材质、尺度、磨损、遮挡和派生位置；不得重新发明新国家徽章、现代 logo、水印或乱码文字。精确符号必须线控或透明图层后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 风格板必须把地域、势力、阶层的暖多色路线作为主视觉，而不是把灰、褐、黑、雪白统一成全剧滤镜。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

参考图执行规则：随附参考图、控制图或线控层用于锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。色彩执行本资产“色彩情绪与故土反差”合同：灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘和灰烬可按场景、材质、天气、旧化和剧情条件使用，但不得成为全剧默认滤镜；场景要保留故土景色和空间美感，主体必须与背景分离。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

Create a cinematic production asset reference card using this Chinese six-section prompt. Use all supplied approved reference images/control layers when provided, and do not invent precise symbols or readable text.
