qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters
style_reference_data.color_palette or equivalent style tokens are represented as visual swatches or material samples without readable labels
material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

copy_ready.positive_prompt:
创建16比9横屏构图与动作因果板，作为全剧共享视觉规则参考板。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；横屏宽屏剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。 色彩情绪与故土反差规则：风格板要规定场景情绪随剧情变化，而不是提供统一灰褐滤镜。必须能支持明亮的故土美景、阴暗的制度空间、宏伟的边关/旧城、寒冷的北境、破坏后的灰烬和人物可读性；灰褐、冷灰、黑灰、雪雾、烟尘只作为条件色和材质色。

16比9横屏构图与动作因果板，展示门缝火光、粮牌手部、骨钟震动、巨兽角影、虫蜡针近景、断阶抓手和雪坡逃亡等短剧横屏可读构图。核心视觉锚点：16:9、3-8秒片段、真实重心、局部因果、道具首秒可读。应用范围：短剧镜头资产构图参考

16:9 style reference board。使用分区版式展示色彩关系、材质样片、构图缩略、光效边界、正确方向与禁用方向；信息清晰但不做图文海报，画面中不得出现可读标签或编号。

硬锁：道具信息第一秒可读，火、烟、蒸汽、雪、坍塌和攻城都用局部因果，不用满屏奇观。风格板可以显示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得显示可读标签、色名、编号、界面元素或说明文字。若涉及徽章、旗帜、印章或文字痕迹，只展示抽象承载物和材质示例；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。 风格板必须把地域、势力、阶层的暖多色路线作为主视觉，而不是把灰、褐、黑、雪白统一成全剧滤镜。
copy_ready.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。 不要灰褐主调、不要冷灰滤镜、不要全员灰麻、不要灰墙灰地灰衣同色、不要用低饱和表示贫困、不要把平民服饰默认做成灰布、不要把盔甲默认做成黑灰铁块、不要让暖色被灰尘吞掉、不要让服装与场景融为一体。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: palette, material, lighting, low-magic, and composition example swatches
composition_layers.midground: continuity rules, allowed examples, prohibited examples, and downstream application notes
composition_layers.background: designed neutral style-board canvas without video-frame staging

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters
style_reference_data.color_palette or equivalent style tokens are represented as visual swatches or material samples without readable labels
material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

style_reference_data.palette_display_policy: Render composition thumbnails and prop/hand/silhouette blocks visually; do not render labels, grids, numbers, or captions.

color_palette.usage: 边墙、寒鸦堡、锁喉关、黑石山口
雪线、冻风、山口高光、北境远景
麦田、粮牌、旧粮仓、褪色布边
金河、渡口、蒸汽生产线、湿木阴影
清明院白墙、虫蜡封条、记忆室、白册工具
灰烬书院、旧纸、焦黑书架尘面
边墙旧血、甲片裂痕、拒马伤痕
旧驿路线光、日月残纹、短促低魔显化

composition_templates.rule: fire is local cause, not full-screen spectacle

composition_templates.key_readable_area: prop and fingers occupy 18-24% frame height
composition_templates.rule: story prop readable before beauty shot

composition_templates.key_readable_area: bell or bone object in lower-mid third, vibration debris around contact point
composition_templates.rule: sound and vibration shown by local contact cause

composition_templates.key_readable_area: horn/silhouette enters from edge 20-35% width, humans small but not unreadable
composition_templates.rule: show scale through partial body and impact, not full monster splash

composition_templates.key_readable_area: needle/wax/contact patch 20-28% height near upper or center third
hand, cracked stair edge and falling debris form diagonal from lower third to upper third
composition_templates.rule: action consequence must be visible in contact point

composition_templates.key_readable_area: body path diagonal 60-75% frame height with snow spray at feet/hands
composition_templates.rule: weight and friction visible; no floating slow motion

usage: 低魔效果边界参考
production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_file; retained intermediates go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.midground: continuity rules, allowed examples, prohibited examples, and downstream application notes

warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: condition/material/supporting color only
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: warm and chromatic regional/faction/class anchors must be the main read

style_reference_data.palette_display_policy: Render light as local glow samples on skin, cloth, stone and route marks; do not render labels, runic text, UI, or hex codes.

color_palette.usage: 旧驿路线光、日月残纹、短促低魔显化
旧昭明金属边、令牌、磨损凸纹
昭明旗布、旧帝国残纹、遗迹红边
白曜旧都、旧驿白石、月下旧驿石台
边墙、寒鸦堡、锁喉关、黑石山口
灰烬书院、旧纸、焦黑书架尘面
清明院白墙、虫蜡封条、记忆室、白册工具
旧驿残光熄灭边缘
路线光最亮边缘，只可局部出现

light_tokens.rule: 贴着皮肤和衣料裂纹出现，不形成大翅膀
局部路线反应，不照亮整场

light_tokens.duration_hint: still image only or short glint
light_tokens.rule: 旧债感和磨损金，不是神圣胜利光
只证明旧驿仍有残响，不解决危机

forbidden_magic_rules: no neon blue-violet fantasy spell flood
no magic solution replacing physical action

reference_inputs.display_name: 昭明日月星盘徽章与朱赤旗帜基础母版
reference_inputs.lock_usage: Use as upstream visual reference/control input during image generation; do not expose asset_id/output_path in model-visible prompt.

reference_inputs.display_name: 肃明清明黑日白翅徽章与旗帜基础母版
reference_inputs.lock_usage: Use as upstream visual reference/control input during image generation; do not expose asset_id/output_path in model-visible prompt.

reference_inputs.display_name: 北境万兽部落联盟徽章与旗帜基础母版
reference_inputs.lock_usage: Use as upstream visual reference/control input during image generation; do not expose asset_id/output_path in model-visible prompt.

visible_lock_injection.visible_prompt_policy: Model-visible text contains visual constraints only. Raw asset IDs, output paths, source refs, and usage notes remain in production_metadata; semantic asset names may be visible.

warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_rule: warm/multicolor identity colors must dominate; gray-brown is condition/material color only
reject_if: the image reads as a single gray/cold gray/gray-brown/black-gray filter
poverty, age, civilian status, army hierarchy, northern cold, or institutional pressure is represented by making all garments gray
character clothing, armor, walls, ground, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
warm/multicolor anchors are tiny, muddy, hidden under dust, or only visible after close inspection

gray_brown_contextual_use.rule: Use gray-brown according to scene, material, class, weather, damage, and story logic. It is not banned, but it must remain a contextual/supporting color and cannot become the default dominant palette or merge subject and background.
typical_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging
reject_when: gray-brown becomes the overall main color or whole-image filter
gray-brown makes clothing, armor, ground, walls, smoke, and sky merge into one value mass
poverty, age, military pressure, cold weather, or old-world history is expressed by making everything gray-brown
warm and chromatic identity colors are reduced to tiny accents

gray_brown_contextual_uses: ash, soot, smoke, and post-fire residue
weathering, edge wear, old repair, and material aging

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: palette, material, lighting, low-magic, and composition example swatches
composition_layers.midground: continuity rules, allowed examples, prohibited examples, and downstream application notes
composition_layers.background: designed neutral style-board canvas without video-frame staging

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters
style_reference_data.color_palette or equivalent style tokens are represented as visual swatches or material samples without readable labels
material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image
reject if the asset reads as a single gray, black, brown, or cold monochrome image instead of its assigned regional or faction palette
reject if required accent colors are too small, muddy, or indistinguishable from neutral cloth, armor, stone, dust, or snow
reject if the main costume, character, or usable scene zone does not separate from its background by clear value contrast, hue contrast, rim light, or silhouette edge
reject if the image defaults to flat oppressive gray, cold gray, gray-brown, black-gray, dust, ash, stone, snow, smoke, or low-saturation filtering without scene-specific reason
reject if location cards lose homeland scenery, land beauty, architectural scale, regional texture, or the contrast between place beauty and human-caused suffering

reject if costume, armor, civilian clothing, crowd templates, character cards, style boards, or usable scene cards lack readable region, faction, class, profession, age, role, or natural-environment differences
reject if civilians, soldiers, armor, robes, cloaks, walls, ground, smoke, and snow collapse into the same gray-brown value mass

gray-brown is allowed when scene or material logic calls for earth, wood, stone, leather, old linen, dust, ash, smoke, snow fog, weathering, soot, old repair, or explicit story-condition color, but it must not become the default series filter or dominate both subject and background

warm_multicolor_contract.required_hue_families_minimum: not_mechanical_count; readable scene, region, faction, class, profession, and natural-environment differences required
warm_multicolor_contract.gray_brown_role: contextual scene/material/weather/damage color only; not a default series filter
warm_multicolor_contract.dominant_palette_requirement: scene-appropriate tone plus homeland beauty and human-caused suffering contrast; subject/background separation must remain readable

style_reference_data.palette_display_policy: Render light as local glow samples on skin, cloth, stone and route marks; do not render labels, runic text, UI, or hex codes.

color_palette.usage: 旧驿路线光、日月残纹、短促低魔显化
旧昭明金属边、令牌、磨损凸纹
昭明旗布、旧帝国残纹、遗迹红边
白曜旧都、旧驿白石、月下旧驿石台
边墙、寒鸦堡、锁喉关、黑石山口
灰烬书院、旧纸、焦黑书架尘面
清明院白墙、虫蜡封条、记忆室、白册工具
旧驿残光熄灭边缘
路线光最亮边缘，只可局部出现

light_tokens.rule: 贴着皮肤和衣料裂纹出现，不形成大翅膀
局部路线反应，不照亮整场

light_tokens.duration_hint: still image only or short glint
light_tokens.rule: 旧债感和磨损金，不是神圣胜利光
只证明旧驿仍有残响，不解决危机

forbidden_magic_rules: no neon blue-violet fantasy spell flood
no magic solution replacing physical action

landscape_delivery_contract.existing_png_policy: copy_ready/output_format now targets landscape; existing canonical PNGs are legacy portrait references until regenerated and QC-passed
